description.zh-cn: 电子面单：对接快递鸟电子面单接口，按订单收货信息一键申请快递单号(LogisticCode)并保存打印数据，支持多快递公司与寄件人模板。需开通快递鸟电子面单服务与对应快递网点月结账号。
description.en: E-Waybill: integrates Kdniao e-waybill API to request a tracking number (LogisticCode) from an order's shipping info and store print data, supporting multiple carriers and a sender template. Requires Kdniao e-waybill service and carrier account.
